verification_notes: 18-hole par 72 confirmed by multiple sources (1golf.eu, allsquaregolf.com, golfasian.com, golfpass.com). Yardage 7,109 yards confirmed by golfasian.com and 1golf.eu; allsquaregolf.com lists 6,516 (blue tees) — using 7,109 from back tees as standard listing. Year 1993 confirmed by multiple sources. Designer: No specific architect identified across any source; golfasian.com describes as 'Local Design'. Setting 'local design team' as best available. Address confirmed: 622 Moo 12, Korat-Pak Thong Chai Road, Baan Lam Ruak, Pak Thong Chai District, Nakhon Ratchasima 30150. Phone: +66 44 249 060 confirmed by web search (also +66 12 120 254 from 1golf.eu — likely mobile). Website: koratgolf.com confirmed via web search. Green fees: 800 THB weekday / 1,200 THB weekend from 1golf.eu, consistent across multiple sources. Caddie mandatory per web search (1golf.eu flags caddie available; multiple sources confirm mandatory). Cart fee 600 THB from web search (also listed as 500 THB on golfasian.com — using 600 as more recent and consistent figure). Driving range: conflicting sources — one notes a grass driving range, another says none. Setting null, verify before publishing. GPS is model estimate for Pak Thong Chai area. primeRange note for Stage 5: ฿฿ (GF 800–1,200 THB + caddie ~400 THB + cart 500–600 THB = total 1,700–2,200 THB).
disputes: Cart fee: golfasian.com lists 500 THB; web search results (1golf.eu region) list 600 THB. Using 600 THB as more conservative/recent estimate; provisional.
Driving range: contradictory sources. One review mentions a 'grass driving range that could be better maintained'; another source lists no driving range. Setting null pending confirmation.
Designer: No named architect identified. Golfasian lists 'Local Design'. Setting designer to null in fields, noting local design in prose.

name.value: Rooks Korat Country Club Golf & Resort

prose.overview: Rooks Korat Country Club Golf & Resort is an 18-hole par-72 course in Pak Thong Chai, Nakhon Ratchasima, opened in 1993 and situated approximately 15 minutes south of Korat town on the Korat-Pak Thong Chai road. The course is operated under the Korat Country Club brand and is one of the more established golf venues in the wider Nakhon Ratchasima province, predating most of the premium resort-style courses that have opened in the Khao Yai National Park corridor in subsequent decades. It occupies a woodland setting surrounded by mature trees and offers a traditional, no-frills club golf experience at accessible pricing. The course includes on-site accommodation and a restaurant, making it a self-contained stop for golfers exploring the Korat region. Its location further into Nakhon Ratchasima than Pak Chong-area courses means it is less commonly combined with national park tourism, but it suits golfers making a dedicated Korat area golf trip.
prose.layout_and_experience: The 18-hole layout extends to 7,109 yards from the back tees, making it one of the longer courses in the Nakhon Ratchasima region. The par-72 format with a woodland setting features challenging par fours that reward accurate driving through the tree-lined corridors. Greens at Rooks Korat are noted across visitor reviews as small and well-maintained, placing a premium on precise approach play rather than power. The inland woodland setting means minimal wind interference, making trajectory and ball-striking consistency the primary variables. A caddie is required, which is helpful given the course's layout complexity. The resort character of the facility — with accommodation, a restaurant, and pool on site — makes it suitable for a dedicated golf trip rather than a day-trip from Bangkok or Pak Chong.
prose.tips: Rooks Korat is best suited as a destination for golfers based in Korat (Nakhon Ratchasima city) or those extending a Khao Yai golf trip further northeast. The course is approximately three hours from Bangkok and sits well east of Pak Chong, making it a longer drive than most Khao Yai-area alternatives. The weekday green fee is very accessible; add caddie and cart for a typical all-in total in the 1,700–2,200 THB range. The small greens demand accurate approach play — club selection one club more than usual on uphill approaches. Book via the official website koratgolf.com or call +66 44 249 060 at least one day ahead.
prose.location_and_access: Rooks Korat Country Club is located at 622 Moo 12, Korat-Pak Thong Chai Road, Baan Lam Ruak, Pak Thong Chai District, Nakhon Ratchasima 30150. From central Bangkok, the drive is approximately three hours (around 240 km) via Route 1 (Mittraphap Highway) to Korat, then Route 304 south toward Pak Thong Chai. A private car is required; the course is not served by public transport. The location is notably further from Bangkok than the Pak Chong / Khao Yai National Park cluster of courses.
prose.rental_cta_context: Making the drive out to Rooks Korat for a Korat golf trip? LENGOLF delivers TaylorMade and Callaway club sets to your Bangkok hotel before you head northeast, so you skip the airport baggage queue entirely.

en.title: Rooks Korat Country Club — Green Fees, Course Guide & Golf Club Rentals
en.meta_description: Rooks Korat Country Club Nakhon Ratchasima: 18-hole 7,109-yard course guide, green fees from 800 THB, visitor tips, and golf club rentals from Bangkok.
